hyperedges.label: RoCE-perf subject documentation triad (CLAUDE.md, README.md, NCCL-DEEP-DIVE.md) cross-reference each other as one architecture+usage+deep-dive doc set
Templates sharing the roce-perf.* Helm helper functions (env/container/volumes/labels) so pod shape changes happen in one place
NCCL one-vs-many execution flow: run_suite.sh drives rail_routes.sh (source routing) and nccl_one_vs_many.sh (mpirun sweep) against the nccl-pods, configured by values.nccl

nodes.label: Latest run dir per env-label (dirname sorts ascending by timestamp).
nodes.norm_label: latest run dir per env-label (dirname sorts ascending by timestamp).

nodes.label: Grouped bar: x = message size, group = environment.
nodes.norm_label: grouped bar: x = message size, group = environment.

nodes.label: CDF overlay of raw -U samples -> tail-latency comparison across envs.
nodes.norm_label: cdf overlay of raw -u samples -> tail-latency comparison across envs.

nodes.label: Re-parse raw perftest stdout: keep 1-2-field all-numeric lines' last field.
nodes.norm_label: re-parse raw perftest stdout: keep 1-2-field all-numeric lines' last field.

nodes.label: Raw -U samples as a 1-D array, or None. Try the filtered .unsorted.txt     first
nodes.norm_label: raw -u samples as a 1-d array, or none. try the filtered .unsorted.txt     first

nodes.label: Downsample to ~target points while KEEPING spikes (max within each bin).
nodes.norm_label: downsample to ~target points while keeping spikes (max within each bin).

nodes.label: Latency vs sample index (proxy for time) -> see spikes/jitter over the run.
nodes.norm_label: latency vs sample index (proxy for time) -> see spikes/jitter over the run.

nodes.label: Histogram of the -U sample distribution (log-y so the tail is visible).
nodes.norm_label: histogram of the -u sample distribution (log-y so the tail is visible).

nodes.label: Grouped busbw bar: x = collective, one-HCA vs all-HCA (per env).
nodes.norm_label: grouped busbw bar: x = collective, one-hca vs all-hca (per env).

nodes.label: Parse an nccl-tests stdout table -> [{size, algbw, busbw}] per message size.
nodes.norm_label: parse an nccl-tests stdout table -> [{size, algbw, busbw}] per message size.

nodes.label: Per-collective busbw-vs-size (one dashed / all solid) PLUS a cross-collective
nodes.norm_label: per-collective busbw-vs-size (one dashed / all solid) plus a cross-collective

nodes.label: Write every test's numbers into flat CSVs under <report>/data/ so nothing     is
nodes.norm_label: write every test's numbers into flat csvs under <report>/data/ so nothing     is

nodes.label: Subject Folder Convention: README.md (usage) + CLAUDE.md (architecture) per subject, reusing the shared CUDA image
nodes.norm_label: subject folder convention: readme.md (usage) + claude.md (architecture) per subject, reusing the shared cuda image

nodes.label: values.yaml — chart configuration (image, topology, scenario, benchmarks, gpudirect, nccl, results, report)
nodes.norm_label: values.yaml — chart configuration (image, topology, scenario, benchmarks, gpudirect, nccl, results, report)

nodes.label: Dockerfile — shared CUDA13+RDMA benchmark image (perftest, NCCL, OpenMPI)
nodes.norm_label: dockerfile — shared cuda13+rdma benchmark image (perftest, nccl, openmpi)

nodes.label: run_suite.sh — host-side oc-based driver script (IP discovery, launches clients, --report, --nccl)
nodes.norm_label: run_suite.sh — host-side oc-based driver script (ip discovery, launches clients, --report, --nccl)

nodes.label: files/plot_report.py — report/plotting script (BW bars, latency CDF/histogram, NCCL bars)
nodes.norm_label: files/plot_report.py — report/plotting script (bw bars, latency cdf/histogram, nccl bars)

nodes.label: templates/_helpers.tpl — roce-perf.env / roce-perf.container / roce-perf.volumes shared helpers
nodes.norm_label: templates/_helpers.tpl — roce-perf.env / roce-perf.container / roce-perf.volumes shared helpers

nodes.label: files/rail_routes.sh — per-rail source routing (ip rule from <rail-ip>, loose rp_filter)
nodes.norm_label: files/rail_routes.sh — per-rail source routing (ip rule from <rail-ip>, loose rp_filter)

nodes.label: files/nccl_one_vs_many.sh — builds nccl-tests, runs mpirun one-HCA-vs-all per collective
nodes.norm_label: files/nccl_one_vs_many.sh — builds nccl-tests, runs mpirun one-hca-vs-all per collective

nodes.label: Leaf/spine = which NIC an endpoint uses (8 rails/node, first 4 leaf1, next 4 leaf2)
nodes.norm_label: leaf/spine = which nic an endpoint uses (8 rails/node, first 4 leaf1, next 4 leaf2)

nodes.label: One VF per pod convention: device-plugin resource + NAD derived per-pod from the nic
nodes.norm_label: one vf per pod convention: device-plugin resource + nad derived per-pod from the nic

nodes.label: Results storage precedence: pvcName (shared RWX) > hostPath (node-local, default) > emptyDir; run_suite.sh --report gathers node-local results so no shared PVC is needed except for the in-cluster report Job
nodes.norm_label: results storage precedence: pvcname (shared rwx) > hostpath (node-local, default) > emptydir; run_suite.sh --report gathers node-local results so no shared pvc is needed except for the in-cluster report job

nodes.label: NUMA pinning: numactl wraps perftest per rail's NIC numa_node, best-effort unless pod is Guaranteed QoS + topology manager single-numa-node
nodes.norm_label: numa pinning: numactl wraps perftest per rail's nic numa_node, best-effort unless pod is guaranteed qos + topology manager single-numa-node

nodes.label: Per-rail source routing: multi-VF pods need one routing table + ip rule per rail-IP to avoid rp_filter drops
nodes.norm_label: per-rail source routing: multi-vf pods need one routing table + ip rule per rail-ip to avoid rp_filter drops

nodes.label: IPv4-mapped RoCE v2 GID (::ffff:<rail-ip>, typically index 3) required for cross-leaf routing; link-local GIDs don't route
nodes.norm_label: ipv4-mapped roce v2 gid (::ffff:<rail-ip>, typically index 3) required for cross-leaf routing; link-local gids don't route

nodes.label: Memory-backed /dev/shm (default 8-16Gi) on NCCL pods to avoid k8s default 64Mi 'No space left on device'
nodes.norm_label: memory-backed /dev/shm (default 8-16gi) on nccl pods to avoid k8s default 64mi 'no space left on device'

nodes.label: build_test_plan invariant: server and client independently derive identical port-per-(test,size) assignment from the same env, no negotiation needed
nodes.norm_label: build_test_plan invariant: server and client independently derive identical port-per-(test,size) assignment from the same env, no negotiation needed

nodes.label: algbw vs busbw: busbw = algbw x 2(n-1)/n corrects for AllReduce's multi-hop wire traffic; busbw is the hardware-comparable number
nodes.norm_label: algbw vs busbw: busbw = algbw x 2(n-1)/n corrects for allreduce's multi-hop wire traffic; busbw is the hardware-comparable number

nodes.label: one-HCA-vs-all: rail-scaling test via NCCL_IB_HCA (1 rail vs all rails), not a GPU-participation test; expects ~N x scaling
nodes.norm_label: one-hca-vs-all: rail-scaling test via nccl_ib_hca (1 rail vs all rails), not a gpu-participation test; expects ~n x scaling

nodes.label: *_CFG two-layer env design: chart renders NCCL_*_CFG placeholders (e.g. 'auto'), runner resolves them into real documented NCCL_* vars passed via mpirun -x
nodes.norm_label: *_cfg two-layer env design: chart renders nccl_*_cfg placeholders (e.g. 'auto'), runner resolves them into real documented nccl_* vars passed via mpirun -x

nodes.label: Collectives swept one-HCA-vs-all: all_reduce_perf, alltoall_perf, reduce_scatter_perf, sendrecv_perf — each a distinct traffic pattern
nodes.norm_label: collectives swept one-hca-vs-all: all_reduce_perf, alltoall_perf, reduce_scatter_perf, sendrecv_perf — each a distinct traffic pattern

nodes.label: values.scenario — server/sameLeaf/spine endpoint topology (node, nic, nad, gpuIndex)
nodes.norm_label: values.scenario — server/sameleaf/spine endpoint topology (node, nic, nad, gpuindex)

nodes.label: values.nccl — nodes, rails, gpus, collectives, sizes, ib.* tuning for the one-HCA-vs-all test
nodes.norm_label: values.nccl — nodes, rails, gpus, collectives, sizes, ib.* tuning for the one-hca-vs-all test

nodes.label: values.benchmarks — bw.{read,write} and lat.{write,read,send} perftest matrix config
nodes.norm_label: values.benchmarks — bw.{read,write} and lat.{write,read,send} perftest matrix config
